channel.title: Thorpe Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Thorpe Family History

item.title: Ann Lincoln Tallman
item.description: Ann Lincoln Tallman Biographical Profile Name: Ann Lincoln Tallman Role in this project: Older Tallman-line spouse identified in the Durfee genealogy as mother of Benjamin Tallman.

item.title: Benjamin Tallman 1684-1769
item.description: Benjamin Tallman 1684-1769 Biographical Profile Name: Benjamin Tallman Role in this project: Earlier Tallman-line ancestor named in the Durfee genealogy as father of William Tallman.

item.title: Mary Woodley
item.description: Mary Woodley Biographical Profile Name: Mary Woodley Role in this project: Harrison-line mother of Elizabeth Harrison, connecting the Tallman branch to the Rockingham County Harrison/Woodley material in Settlers by the Long Grey Trail.

item.title: Nathaniel Harrison
item.description: Nathaniel Harrison Biographical Profile Name: Nathaniel Harrison Role in this project: Harrison-line father of Elizabeth Harrison, whose marriage to John Tallman connects the Harrison material to the Tallman branch.

item.title: Patience Durfee Tallman
item.description: Patience Durfee Tallman Biographical Profile Name: Patience Durfee Tallman Role in this project: Durfee-line spouse connecting the older Tallman line to The Descendants of Thomas Durfee.

item.title: William Tallman 1720-1791
item.description: William Tallman 1720-1791 Biographical Profile Name: William Tallman Role in this project: Older Tallman-line ancestor identified in the Durfee genealogy as father of Benjamin Tallman.

item.title: Book Outprints — History of Western College
item.description: History of Western College Publication Details BOOK Number: 027 Family/Subject: Institutional history Source Collection: Book Outprints Collection Printed title: Western-Leander-Clark College 1856-1911 Description Institutional history of Western-Leander-Clark College, with a page-level mention of B...

item.title: Benjamin Tallman 1745-1820
item.description: Benjamin Tallman 1745-1820 Biographical Profile Name: Benjamin Tallman Role in this project: Older Tallman-line ancestor connected to the Thorpe pedigree timeline, the Tallman Cemetery burial group, and Fairfield County pioneer narratives.

item.title: John McIntyre Lemmon
item.description: John McIntyre Lemmon Biographical Profile Name: John McIntyre Lemmon Role in this project: Lemmon-line son of Uriah Blake Lemmon and Emily Amanda MacIntyre, documented in census summaries and a Sandusky/Ottawa County biographical sketch.

item.title: John McIntyre of Kilmoore
item.description: John McIntyre of Kilmoore Biographical Profile Name: John McIntyre Disambiguation: Of Kilmoore, County Tyrone, Ireland.
